scripts.lint: pnpm lint:application-queries && pnpm lint:retired-colors && pnpm lint:doc-drift && pnpm lint:migrations && pnpm lint:comments && turbo lint
scripts.test:all: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.demo-advanced:build: docker build -t nojv-demo-advanced-run:local -t registry.nojv.tw/demo/nojv-demo-advanced-run:main infra/docker/demo-advanced-run && docker build -t nojv-demo-advanced-grade:local -t registry.nojv.tw/demo/nojv-demo-advanced-grade:main infra/docker/demo-advanced-grade && docker build -t nojv-demo-advanced-service:local -t registry.nojv.tw/demo/nojv-demo-advanced-service:main apps/web/src/lib/server/advanced-scaffold/files/service
scripts.demo-advanced:push: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t registry.nojv.tw/demo/nojv-demo-advanced-run:main infra/docker/demo-advanced-run && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t registry.nojv.tw/demo/nojv-demo-advanced-grade:main infra/docker/demo-advanced-grade && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t registry.nojv.tw/demo/nojv-demo-advanced-service:main apps/web/src/lib/server/advanced-scaffold/files/service
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm format && pnpm lint:application-queries && pnpm lint:retired-colors && pnpm lint:doc-drift && pnpm lint:migrations && pnpm lint:comments && pnpm db:generate && turbo run build && turbo run typecheck && turbo run lint && pnpm typecheck:tests && pnpm test:unit
